creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
This package pkg-plist references many files in share/vi, while it actually
uses share/vigor. This can break both "make deinstall" and "make package".
share/vi is actually used by the nvi port: "make deinstall" will remove part
of nvi.

Maintainer (billf@FreeBSD.org) notified on 19 Nov 2000.
